_publications._publicationTitle: Distinctive epigenomic alterations in NF1-deficient cutaneous and plexiform neurofibromas drive differential MKK/p38 signaling.

_contextSnippet: CNFs expressed both MKK3 and p38 more abundantly than PNFs, as well as phospho-p38 indicating consistent p38 activation... p38 activation was strongly correlated with pERK expression regardless of tumor type (ρ = 0.70, p = 0.006)
details: Successfully detected phospho-p38 activation showing strong correlation (ρ = 0.70, p = 0.006) with pERK expression and consistent p38 activation in CNFs
